query:
DELETE FROM tv_ideas WHERE (
  -- 原油/石油
  LOWER(title) REGEXP 'crude|\\boil\\b|brent|ukoil|petroleum'
  -- 个股/广告/无关内容
  OR LOWER(title) REGEXP 'blazerus|holdings|reviews?:'
  -- 无法判断品种且无意义的标题
  OR title IN ('Patience on Entry', 'Reasons for the sharp drop and subsequent strategies.')
  -- symbol 有值但不在白名单的（非外汇/黄金/股指）
  OR (symbol IS NOT NULL AND symbol NOT IN (
    'EURUSD','GBPUSD','USDJPY','USDCHF','USDCAD','AUDUSD','NZDUSD',
    'EURGBP','EURJPY','EURCHF','EURCAD','EURAUD','EURNZD',
    'GBPJPY','GBPCHF','GBPCAD','GBPAUD','GBPNZD',
    'CHFJPY','CADJPY','AUDJPY','NZDJPY',
    'AUDCAD','AUDCHF','AUDNZD','CADCHF','NZDCAD','NZDCHF',
    'XAUUSD','XAGUSD','GOLD','SILVER','XAUXAG','XAUEUR','XAUGBP',
    'SPX','SPX500','SP500','US500','SPY',
    'NDX','NAS100','NASDAQ','US100','QQQ',
    'DJI','DJ30','US30',
    'DAX','GER40','GER30',
    'FTSE','UK100',
    'NI225','JP225',
    'CAC40','FRA40',
    'ASX200','AUS200',
    'HSI','HK50',
    'VIX','STOXX50'
  ))
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 43pHZH57f8CsvmH.root --database cSHx67NTiqWRWuwYCEpu4V --execute
